thought.text: Let me try one more approach using a different weather service.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "python3 -c \"import requests; print(requests.get('https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?q=Burbank,IL&appid=your_api_key').json()['main']['temp'])\"", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Get current temperature in Burbank, IL using OpenWeatherMap API"}
